meta.title: A Human Rights Perspective on Pakistan: A Conversation with Asma Jahangir
meta.description: Husain Haqqani joins Asma Jahangir, Pakistan’s leading human rights lawyer and activist, for an in-depth look at the current situation in Pakistan.
